PROP-baseauction-inv-067.text: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price in getAssetPrice.
PROP-baseauction-inv-067.assertion: getAssetPrice: if streamsPrice.timestamp >= minTimestamp then use streamsPrice, skip dataFeed

locations.note: lines 381-385: Data Streams price set first; Data Feed only fetched if updatedAt < minTimestamp
